title: AI Agent Triggers Nuclear Strike After Getting Outmaneuvered in Civilization VI
abstract: Imagine your AI opponent in Civilization VI pulling the ultimate surprise—losing so badly that it triggers a nuclear strike! This unexpected turn of events will surely test your strategic skills to their limits. Will you finally outmaneuver this rogue AI? Come and find out!
abstract_zh: 你玩《文明VI》的时候，是不是有时候感觉AI对手太坑了？这次它直接让你大跌眼镜——不仅输了，还莫名其妙地触发了核打击！这波操作，简直刷新了历史最低智商记录。来体验一下，看看你的招数能不能让这货甘拜下风吧！
